test_sufficiency_summary: Scoped tactical tests pass (OK (65 tests)), but the new FTacticalGame regressions are source-inspection checks rather than seeded behavior-level execution of cleanup and fireICM paths.
documentation_accuracy_summary: DesignNotes.md accurately records the implemented Milestone 5 behavior, validation command/result, and no-runtime-wx-rewiring scope note; documenter artifacts correctly record commit 40a5951f4bd8d58b4e369bf25c717d62f5766212 and handoff details.

findings.summary: Regression coverage inspects source text instead of executing seeded FTacticalGame behavior.
findings.impact: This weakens protection against runtime regressions in destroyed-ship cleanup and fireICM state transitions.
